meta.title: Minami-Furano National Ski Area — LP Mock (Local Sanctuary Strategy)
meta.description: A quiet refuge surrounded by Furano and Tomamu. LP mock for Secret Powder Pass, night skiing, and Ezo deer curry partnerships.

banner.text: Local sanctuary · Secret Powder Pass strategy | Minami-Furano Town Development Corp. | AI-generated mock images

hero.eyebrow: Minami-Furano, Hokkaido · south of Lake Kanayama
hero.title:
Minami-Furano
National Ski Area
hero.tagline: Quiet powder in the heart of mega-resorts.

sanctuary.title:
Furano snow quality,
private quiet.
sanctuary.lead: A municipal hill surrounded by Furano, Tomamu, and Sahoro. World-resort snow without crowds or price spikes—the value of "real winter sport" for eight hours at ¥2,500.
sanctuary.noticeBody: "Five stars if the third lift ran"—don't hide aging infrastructure; pivot to hike-up zones and other value.

primary.title: Furano quality × empty runs
primary.lead: Visitors praise "Furano-level snow" and "hardly anyone there." Less flashy facilities, more uncrowded quality snow and simple hospitality—high loyalty to local community ties.
primary.imgAlt: Untouched powder—ski at your pace on a compact hill

secondary.title: Free cross-country
secondary.lead: XC courses free for residents' fitness, separate from alpine. Long-term step to reduce lift dependence and expand a non-powered winter park.

pass.title:
Marriott × Montbell,
a three-hour secret.
pass.lead: For Fairfield by Marriott guests beside Michi-no-Eki Minami-Furano. Bundle 4-hour lift (¥1,500), Montbell gear rental discount, and Nanpu Ezo katsu curry voucher—a half-day away from Furano crowds.
pass.imgAlt: Beside Michi-no-Eki Minami-Furano—Marriott and major outdoor hub

hike.title:
Turn Lift 2 closure
into a weapon.
hike.lead: Don't hide 2026 Lift 2 issues—redefine slope lines as ungroomed hike-up powder zones (example entry ¥1,000). A new revenue point aligned with the BC boom.
hike.leadCurry: After skiing, head to Nanpu Ezo katsu curry—5 mm-cut Ezo deer local curry as a sustainability story and regional ARPU hook.
hike.imgAlt: Minami-Furano Ezo katsu curry—game meat as regional cuisine

tour.title:
Lake Kanayama area
in three hours.
tour.lead: For inbound and workation guests—monetize "gap time" between mega-resort fatigue with a half-day journey.

05.title: Lake Kanayama
05.body: Optional dinner at Log Hotel Larch

sanctuary.title: Complete local sanctuary guide
sanctuary.body: Within 20 km of Furano Ski Area (28 courses, 9 lifts) yet smaller scale—a paradoxical edge. "Silence," "empty powder," "8 hours ¥2,500"—differentiation from Niseko-izing neighbors.

workation.title: Workation × night powder
workation.body: Remote work at Marriott weekdays, night skiing until 21:00 evenings. For urban IT workers—raise ARPU with minimal capital investment.

lake.title: Lake Kanayama winter resort concept
lake.body: Use development corp cross-site authority to bundle smelt fishing, fat biking, night skiing, and Log Hotel Larch stays into a 2-night/3-day adventure—beyond the ski area alone.

access.line: 北海道空知郡南富良野町字幾寅
access.note: About 22 km from Doto Expressway Tomamu IC · old Kitoro Station area, south of Lake Kanayama · 80 free parking spaces
